specific_question: How many customers used the main phoneline to contact a Sales Representative during the month of July 2025?
answer: In July 2025, 23 customers used the main phoneline to contact an Elexion Automotive Sales Representative.
dr_question: By the end of 2025, how can Elexion Automotive use data generated through its customer relationship management system to analyze customer behavior online and identify patterns that drive sales?
